case_title: DUONG, CHI THIEN vs. PINANCE, IRMA et al

docket_entries.description: OPPOSITION DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUONG, CHI THIEN
DECLARATION OF IRMA PINANCE TO TAKE DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER OFF CALENDAR FILED BY DEFENDANT PINNACE, IRMA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUONG, CHI THIEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PINANCE, IRMA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1531 VISITACION AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, LEASE FORFEITED, *THE WRIT SHALL ISSSUE FORTHWITH BUT EXECUTION THEREON SHALL BE STAYED UNTIL JUNE 30, 2000 AT 6:00P.M.
